title: mentha terasia
intro: Mentha terasia, also known as Thai mint or mint of the mountains, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family. It possesses medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Mentha terasia include relief from headaches, colds, and sore throats, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and alleviate nausea. Mentha terasia can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
